title: React hook for fetching and managing single topic data with mock implementation
purpose: Provides a React hook that fetches and manages a single topic's full data including documents, with loading states, error handling, and actions to verify or refresh the topic.
module_context: Exports a useTopic hook that manages topic data state and provides functions to verify and refresh topic data. Uses mock data for demonstration purposes.

steps.content: Initialize state for topic data, loading status, and error.
Define a callback function to fetch topic data from mock sources.
Fetch topic data on component mount and when the topic name changes.
Define a callback function to update the lastVerified timestamp.
Define a callback function to refresh the topic data.
Return the topic data, loading status, error state, and action functions.
IF the topic name is empty, clear the topic data and loading state.
Set the loading state to true and clear any previous errors.
Simulate an API delay with a timeout.
Look up the topic data in the mock data store.
IF the topic data is not found, throw an error.
Update the topic data state with the fetched data.
IF an error occurs during fetch, set the error state and clear topic data.
Reset the loading state after the fetch attempt completes.
IF no topic data is available, return early.
Simulate an API delay with a timeout.
Update the lastVerified timestamp in the topic data.
IF an error occurs during verification, set the error state.
Call the fetchTopic function to reload the topic data.
